changes_to_standard_terms: Section 12.3 is modified to require 90 days written notice for any material changes
company_promotional_activities_detail: Co-marketing campaigns including joint webinars, blog posts, and social media promotion
company_promotional_materials_detail: Product brochures, case studies, and co-branded marketing collateral
company_sponsored_benefits_detail: Free booth space at Company's annual user conference
company_referral_criteria: Enterprise customers with annual revenue exceeding $10M seeking cloud-based document management
company_payment_to_partner_detail: $5,000 per qualified referral that results in a signed contract
partner_promotional_activities_detail: Include Company's products in Partner's solution demos and sales presentations
partner_promotional_materials_detail: Integration guides and technical documentation for joint customers
partner_sponsored_benefits_detail: Priority access to Partner's developer support team
partner_referral_criteria: Mid-market companies with 50-500 employees seeking professional services support
partner_payment_to_company_detail: $3,000 per qualified referral that results in a signed contract
increased_claim_other_detail: Claims arising from unauthorized sharing or disclosure of customer data
unlimited_claim_other_detail: Claims arising from intentional misuse of the other party's intellectual property
additional_warranty_company_detail: Company warrants that all materials provided are free of known security vulnerabilities
additional_warranty_partner_detail: Partner warrants that all deliverables comply with applicable industry standards
payment_schedule_detail: Net 30 days from receipt of invoice, with payments due on the first business day of each quarter
dpa_description: Data Processing Agreement available at https://techco.com/dpa, incorporated by reference
company_covered_claims_detail: (a) Company's gross negligence or willful misconduct; or (b) Company's breach of its representations and warranties in Section 7, including IP representations
partner_covered_claims_detail: (a) Partner's gross negligence or willful misconduct; or (b) Partner's breach of its representations and warranties in Section 7, including IP representations
jurisdiction: courts located in New Castle County, Delaware
